content:
Okay, here's the hierarchical list of all the category and channel names for "The First Wives Club" server, reflecting the esoteric and themed structure we've built:
The First Wives Club
I. 📜 The Sacred Scrolls & Daily Offering
* #your-name-daily-rune
* #jessicas-daily-glyph
* #maddies-daily-sigil
II. 📚 The Bound Codex
* #daily-invocation-or-axiom
* #curiosity-cabinets
* #the-ancient-grimoires
* #verse-of-the-cosmos
* #mystic-discourses (Optional)
III. 🎭 The Shadowed Veil
* #lament-and-release
* #solace-from-the-coven
* #unveiling-forbidden-lore
IV. ✨ Expeditions & Rituals
* #cinematic-prophecies
* #communal-sagas
* #ritual-gatherings
* #digital-conjurations
V. 😂 The Jest & Oracle's Folly
* #mythic-mirth
* #inner-circle-cantrips
* #serendipitous-omens
VI. 🗣️ The Grand Conclave
* #the-central-chamber
* #off-topic-divergences
* #homework-help (Retained from your original structure for now)
